title: Franky's Side Pushes Forward
description: Pages 9–13 focus on franky's side pushes forward, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as the Smile Factory and the remaining officers become the last obstacles before Luffy can fully confront Doflamingo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: DA-DADA- DAAAAH....!! Over the 9 mountains and across the 8 seas.....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Gathering a thousand "little worlds" of moments...!! And packing them into a cube...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: There is nothing I cannot cut.

dialogue.speaker: Gladius
dialogue.text: So, after 10 years of having your name dragged through the mud, it looks like your popu- Larry is finally recovering, eh...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: A man who can't destroy his enemies is hardly fit to become King!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: But I did every- thing I could while still remaining a "human being"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: If you're saying that I have to become a murderer in order to survive...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Then I would rather choose death!!! There is no future for a country built on Massacre!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: This must be some bad comedy!! Or have you forgotten the truth...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: of how a peace- principal pacifist like yourself was unable to pro- tech his own country!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: It is true... that I failed to protect my own country... I was powerless!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I had no intention of return- ing to the throne again.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Your Highness!! You're the only King for us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: This is why the names of "Good people" are never found in history!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Because they all perish like you are about to!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: He's scaping to the upper half of the body!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: But there's no way for me to know which!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: His main self is definitely in one of them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: He's got nowhere to run and hide into while he's mid- air!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Hngh....just because you've got me cornered....!!

summary: Franky's Side Pushes Forward advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
